title: Marsupilami
tmdbOverview: David is tasked to deliver a mysterious package from South America, only to find out he is carrying a baby Marsupilami!
synopsis: Marsupilami (2026) is a adventure and comedy film from France. It carries a 6.3 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a AL certification (BE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
